trans-unit.source: With our premium add-on, your integrated chatbot stays up to date. Updated website content is automatically incorporated into the chatbot's knowledge base. 14-day free trial, then billed monthly per domain.
trans-unit.target: With our premium add-on, your integrated chatbot stays up to date. Updated website content is automatically incorporated into the chatbot's knowledge base. 14-day free trial, then billed monthly per domain.

trans-unit.source: No configuration has automatic sync enabled yet.
trans-unit.target: No configuration has automatic sync enabled yet.

trans-unit.source: Enable it in AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard → OpenAI base configuration → Vector store sync.
trans-unit.target: Enable it in AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard → OpenAI base configuration → Vector store sync.

trans-unit.source: Could not reach license server - sync allowed under grace period.
trans-unit.target: Could not reach license server - sync allowed under grace period.

trans-unit.source: Enter a valid license key in the OpenAI Configuration to unlock details and automatic sync.
trans-unit.target: Enter a valid license key in the OpenAI Configuration to unlock details and automatic sync.

trans-unit.source: External trigger that wakes Contao every minute.
trans-unit.target: External trigger that wakes Contao every minute.

trans-unit.source: Your server cron may have stopped.
trans-unit.target: Your server cron may have stopped.

trans-unit.source: Contao cron jobs run via web visits only. The CLI cron job required for auto-sync is not configured.
trans-unit.target: Contao cron jobs run via web visits only. The CLI cron job required for auto-sync is not configured.

trans-unit.source: Contao is running cron jobs via website visits only. Scheduled syncs require a real CLI cron job. Add the following entry to your server cron:
trans-unit.target: Contao is running cron jobs via website visits only. Scheduled syncs require a real CLI cron job. Add the following entry to your server cron:

trans-unit.source: The server cron has not run yet. Scheduled syncs only start once the cron job is set up. Add the following entry to your server cron:
trans-unit.target: The server cron has not run yet. Scheduled syncs only start once the cron job is set up. Add the following entry to your server cron:

trans-unit.source: A manual sync via "Run manual sync now" works independently of this, as soon as the remaining prerequisites are met.
trans-unit.target: A manual sync via "Run manual sync now" works independently of this, as soon as the remaining prerequisites are met.

trans-unit.source: Result of the last vector store update.
trans-unit.target: Result of the last vector store update.

trans-unit.source: This configuration syncs only when you click “Run manual sync now”. No server cron is required.
trans-unit.target: This configuration syncs only when you click “Run manual sync now”. No server cron is required.

trans-unit.source: No automatic schedule - start each sync with the button below.
trans-unit.target: No automatic schedule - start each sync with the button below.

trans-unit.source: Manual sync button unavailable on this server
trans-unit.target: Manual sync button unavailable on this server

trans-unit.source: This server disables PHP process spawning (proc_open), so the “Run manual sync now” button cannot start the sync. Run it from the command line instead (e.g. via SSH or a one-off cron task):
trans-unit.target: This server disables PHP process spawning (proc_open), so the “Run manual sync now” button cannot start the sync. Run it from the command line instead (e.g. via SSH or a one-off cron task):

trans-unit.source: Defined by you in the OpenAI configuration.
trans-unit.target: Defined by you in the OpenAI configuration.

trans-unit.source: The server cron is not running, so scheduled syncs will not start. Set up or restart the server cron (see the “Server cron” box). You can still sync manually.
trans-unit.target: The server cron is not running, so scheduled syncs will not start. Set up or restart the server cron (see the “Server cron” box). You can still sync manually.

trans-unit.source: First sync: start manually with the button below; the schedule applies from the second run onward.
trans-unit.target: First sync: start manually with the button below; the schedule applies from the second run onward.

trans-unit.source: Your license still works for now, but a payment needs attention.
trans-unit.target: Your license still works for now, but a payment needs attention.

trans-unit.source: Check for plan changes without re-entering your license key.
trans-unit.target: Check for plan changes without re-entering your license key.

trans-unit.source: License status refreshed - no plan change.
trans-unit.target: License status refreshed - no plan change.

trans-unit.source: License is not active. Enter a valid key in the OpenAI Configuration.
trans-unit.target: License is not active. Enter a valid key in the OpenAI Configuration.

trans-unit.source: Your last synced content is still accessible in OpenAI but will no longer be updated automatically.
trans-unit.target: Your last synced content is still accessible in OpenAI but will no longer be updated automatically.

trans-unit.source: If you recently re-subscribed, a new license key was sent to your email. Enter it in the OpenAI Configuration to reactivate sync.
trans-unit.target: If you recently re-subscribed, a new license key was sent to your email. Enter it in the OpenAI Configuration to reactivate sync.

trans-unit.source: Cannot dispatch sync: proc_open is disabled on this server. Run the sync via the command line instead: php vendor/bin/contao-console contao:openai-vector-sync [config-id]
trans-unit.target: Cannot dispatch sync: proc_open is disabled on this server. Run the sync via the command line instead: php vendor/bin/contao-console contao:openai-vector-sync [config-id]

trans-unit.source:
Note: The automatically synced files are written directly into the vector store and do not appear under "OpenAI Dashboard" → "File upload".
The File upload screen is only for files you upload manually.
trans-unit.target:
Note: The automatically synced files are written directly into the vector store and do not appear under "OpenAI Dashboard" → "File upload".
The File upload screen is only for files you upload manually.

trans-unit.source: These are token counts. The OpenAI API does not report costs; see your actual billed usage in the OpenAI dashboard.
trans-unit.target: These are token counts. The OpenAI API does not report costs; see your actual billed usage in the OpenAI dashboard.

trans-unit.source: No stored document is available for this sync run.
trans-unit.target: No stored document is available for this sync run.

trans-unit.source: Stop the automatic synchronisation for this configuration? No further scheduled syncs will run until you re-enable it in the OpenAI configuration.
trans-unit.target: Stop the automatic synchronisation for this configuration? No further scheduled syncs will run until you re-enable it in the OpenAI configuration.

trans-unit.source: Automatic synchronisation stopped. Re-enable it any time under AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard → OpenAI base configuration → Vector store sync.
trans-unit.target: Automatic synchronisation stopped. Re-enable it any time under AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard → OpenAI base configuration → Vector store sync.

trans-unit.source: "Stop automatic sync" unticks "Enable sync" in the OpenAI configuration. Re-enable it there whenever you want scheduled syncs to resume.
trans-unit.target: "Stop automatic sync" unticks "Enable sync" in the OpenAI configuration. Re-enable it there whenever you want scheduled syncs to resume.

trans-unit.source: Sync queued. Refresh this page in a few minutes to see the result.
trans-unit.target: Sync queued. Refresh this page in a few minutes to see the result.

trans-unit.source: Manual sync dispatched to CLI. Refresh this page in a few minutes.
trans-unit.target: Manual sync dispatched to CLI. Refresh this page in a few minutes.

trans-unit.source: No indexed pages found for this site root (tl_search is empty). Run System → Maintenance → "Update the search index". If pages are still missing, check whether they carry robots=noindex or Search indexer=Never index - set Search indexer=Always index on those page records to force-include them in both Contao search and the vector store.
trans-unit.target: No indexed pages found for this site root (tl_search is empty). Run System → Maintenance → "Update the search index". If pages are still missing, check whether they carry robots=noindex or Search indexer=Never index - set Search indexer=Always index on those page records to force-include them in both Contao search and the vector store.

trans-unit.source: No page content found to upload; aborting before replacing the existing file.
trans-unit.target: No page content found to upload; aborting before replacing the existing file.

trans-unit.source: The model returned an empty document; aborting before replacing the existing file.
trans-unit.target: The model returned an empty document; aborting before replacing the existing file.

trans-unit.source: None of the selected pages were found in the search index. Make sure the website root has a domain name, update the search index under System → Maintenance → "Update the search index", and check the page settings "Robots tag" (or "Search indexer" in Contao 5.7) on the affected pages.
trans-unit.target: None of the selected pages were found in the search index. Make sure the website root has a domain name, update the search index under System → Maintenance → "Update the search index", and check the page settings "Robots tag" (or "Search indexer" in Contao 5.7) on the affected pages.

trans-unit.source: No vector store ID configured. Complete the file upload workflow or set a vector store ID first.
trans-unit.target: No vector store ID configured. Complete the file upload workflow or set a vector store ID first.

trans-unit.source: Multiple site roots detected. Select the pages to keep updated under AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard → OpenAI base configuration → Vector store sync.
trans-unit.target: Multiple site roots detected. Select the pages to keep updated under AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard → OpenAI base configuration → Vector store sync.

trans-unit.source: Could not create a temporary file for the upload.
trans-unit.target: Could not create a temporary file for the upload.

trans-unit.source: OpenAI Files upload did not return a file ID.
trans-unit.target: OpenAI Files upload did not return a file ID.

trans-unit.source: Automatic sync is not enabled for this configuration.
trans-unit.target: Automatic sync is not enabled for this configuration.

trans-unit.source: A sync is already queued or running for this configuration.
trans-unit.target: A sync is already queued or running for this configuration.

trans-unit.source: Could not start the sync process. Your host may disable PHP process spawning (proc_open). Run it from the command line instead: vendor/bin/contao-console contao:openai-vector-sync <id>
trans-unit.target: Could not start the sync process. Your host may disable PHP process spawning (proc_open). Run it from the command line instead: vendor/bin/contao-console contao:openai-vector-sync <id>

trans-unit.source: The sync run stopped responding and was marked as failed (the process was probably terminated). You can start a new sync.
trans-unit.target: The sync run stopped responding and was marked as failed (the process was probably terminated). You can start a new sync.

trans-unit.source: Your plan allows at most %1$s pages, so %2$s additional page(s) were not synced. Reduce the selected pages or upgrade your plan to include them.
trans-unit.target: Your plan allows at most %1$s pages, so %2$s additional page(s) were not synced. Reduce the selected pages or upgrade your plan to include them.

trans-unit.source: %1$s file upload(s) failed and will be retried on the next run.
trans-unit.target: %1$s file upload(s) failed and will be retried on the next run.

trans-unit.source: No usable OpenAI API key for configuration %1$s. Please re-enter and save the API key in the OpenAI configuration (AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard → OpenAI base configuration).
trans-unit.target: No usable OpenAI API key for configuration %1$s. Please re-enter and save the API key in the OpenAI configuration (AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard → OpenAI base configuration).

trans-unit.source: No vector store exists yet. Upload one document once via AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard → File upload; this automatically creates the vector store.
trans-unit.target: No vector store exists yet. Upload one document once via AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard → File upload; this automatically creates the vector store.

trans-unit.source: No pages selected. Choose the pages to keep updated under AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard → OpenAI base configuration → Vector store sync.
trans-unit.target: No pages selected. Choose the pages to keep updated under AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard → OpenAI base configuration → Vector store sync.

trans-unit.source:
The search index is currently empty. No action needed: every sync run starts the Contao crawler first and rebuilds the search index automatically.
If a sync still reports "no indexed pages" afterwards, update the search index manually under System → Maintenance → "Update the search index" and check the page settings "Robots tag" and "Do not search the page" (Contao 5.3) or "Search indexer" (Contao 5.7).
trans-unit.target:
The search index is currently empty. No action needed: every sync run starts the Contao crawler first and rebuilds the search index automatically.
If a sync still reports "no indexed pages" afterwards, update the search index manually under System → Maintenance → "Update the search index" and check the page settings "Robots tag" and "Do not search the page" (Contao 5.3) or "Search indexer" (Contao 5.7).

trans-unit.source: No usable OpenAI API key. Please re-enter and save the API key in the OpenAI configuration (AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard → OpenAI base configuration).
trans-unit.target: No usable OpenAI API key. Please re-enter and save the API key in the OpenAI configuration (AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard → OpenAI base configuration).

trans-unit.source:
None of the selected pages are currently in the search index. No action needed: every sync run starts the Contao crawler first and rebuilds the search index automatically.
If a sync still reports that the selected pages are not indexed, check the page settings "Robots tag" and "Do not search the page" (Contao 5.3) or "Search indexer" (Contao 5.7), and make sure the website root (the "website starting point") has a "domain name".
trans-unit.target:
None of the selected pages are currently in the search index. No action needed: every sync run starts the Contao crawler first and rebuilds the search index automatically.
If a sync still reports that the selected pages are not indexed, check the page settings "Robots tag" and "Do not search the page" (Contao 5.3) or "Search indexer" (Contao 5.7), and make sure the website root (the "website starting point") has a "domain name".

trans-unit.source: Your page selection spans multiple domains. One license covers one domain - select pages from a single domain, or purchase a separate license for each additional domain.
trans-unit.target: Your page selection spans multiple domains. One license covers one domain - select pages from a single domain, or purchase a separate license for each additional domain.

trans-unit.source: No active premium license for this configuration.
trans-unit.target: No active premium license for this configuration.

trans-unit.source: To do before the first sync:
trans-unit.target: To do before the first sync:

trans-unit.source: Everything is ready - the sync can run.
trans-unit.target: Everything is ready - the sync can run.

trans-unit.source: Everything is ready - automatic synchronisation is active and runs on schedule. You can also start a manual sync any time below.
trans-unit.target: Everything is ready - automatic synchronisation is active and runs on schedule. You can also start a manual sync any time below.

trans-unit.source: Everything is ready - start the first sync with the button below. Later syncs run automatically on your schedule.
trans-unit.target: Everything is ready - start the first sync with the button below. Later syncs run automatically on your schedule.

trans-unit.source: Resolve the open items above first.
trans-unit.target: Resolve the open items above first.
